target.label: Epic 5: UX Mockup Fidelity — Close Visual Drift

concerns.description: no-scrollbar class missing from full-width artifact list pane (artifacts/page.tsx:123). Two-pane layout has the class and is tested, but full-width layout is missing it and has no test. Both an implementation and test coverage gap.
concerns.remediation: Add no-scrollbar class to line 123; add test case rendering page without id searchParam

concerns.description: Branded placeholder 'Message bmad-easy…' not wired up by parent component. Implementation sets default to 'Message…' (tested), but branded variant is never passed. Implementation gap, not test gap.
concerns.remediation: Wire placeholder prop on ChatInput in new-conversation context

concerns.description: Tests cover only zero-conversation case for top-clustered nav links. jsdom cannot test scroll behavior with conversations filling the viewport.
concerns.remediation: Add E2E layout test with conversations if needed

concerns.description: NFR-5.4 returned PASS WITH CONCERNS: 2 Medium findings (missing select projection on repoConnection.findUnique, AC-7 full-width pane gap) and 3 Low findings (keyboard scrollability, missing maxLength, no-scrollbar panels not keyboard-scrollable). All pre-existing or follow-up items.

recommendations.action: Fix AC-7 full-width pane gap — add no-scrollbar to artifacts/page.tsx:123 and add test case
Run E2E test suite against running dev server + database to verify all E2E tests pass (not executed in this session)
Wire up branded placeholder 'Message bmad-easy…' on ChatInput in new-conversation context (AC-5, Story 5.3)

Address pre-existing NFR findings (select projection on repoConnection.findUnique, maxLength on input, keyboard scrollability of no-scrollbar panels)
